Publications

Publications

Journal and conference papers. See research, software, and writing for context.

Browse
Research themes Software work Technical writing

Manuscripts

Submitted and under review

ZeroDown: A Zero-Downtime IoT Policy Enforcement Framework

A zero-downtime post-commissioning policy enforcement framework for MCU-class IoT devices using an embedded uBPF runtime and secure OTA policy lifecycle management.

Submitted to ACM WiSec · 2026

BlueSentry: Dynamic Runtime eBPF Policies for Comprehensive BLE Security on Embedded Devices

A BLE security framework combining FSM-based enforcement and runtime-tunable eBPF policies for embedded-device threat detection without kernel or controller changes.

Under review · 2025

Journals

Journal articles

  1. Akailvi, S., Gautam, U., Bhandari, P., Rashid, H., Huff, P. D., & Springer, J. P. (2023). HELOT–Hunting Evil Life in Operational Technology. IEEE Transactions on Smart Grid, 14(4), 3058–3071. http://dx.doi.org/10.1109/TSG.2022.3222261
